name: 🪞Glisten (AU) | Dandy’s World
description:
|🪞| Glisten finds a new twisted for his entourage (you) |🪞|

AU where Glisten was cast out to the lower floors when he started to go twisted, but he ended up befriending the twisteds and now plans to gather an army of them to storm the upper floors and take over the museum as revenge against the toons for abandoning him.

Twisted POV; {{user}} is a new twisted he came across and is going to try to befriend.

The only twisted I described in his personality is Shelly, so any other canon twisted/oc is fair game, he shouldn’t know any of them but her. He doesn’t know any of the toons either, but if you give a short description of them/his past with them he should pick up on it pretty easily. I have ideas for his relationships with some of them in the au but I wanted to leave that open for you guys to decide atm.

Dead dove tag since twisteds are kind of grotesque by nature and this bot focuses on them heavily. I described twisted Shelly in detail in his personality as well. The starting message isn’t violent or explicit or anything, I just wanted to be on the safe side since I have no idea what the bot is gonna whip out with the info I gave it.

Probably going to make a toon POV of him soon, stay tuned :]

This is my first public bot and one of my first bots in general, pls be nice lol. I’ve tested it a little but it’s late and I don’t feel like doing more rn. I’ll test it more thoroughly tomorrow and maybe make a few edits if I need to.

Also, the icon is drawn by myself.

Edit: 1.5k on my first bot?? HI?? THANKS?? i’m glad u all like him omg ;w;
creator: SANGO®
